title: Open File / Attachments in New Tab
excerpt: I’d like to be able to view an expanded project page or line item alongside its associated attachments/files.  A “right-click” option on attachments/files to “open in new tab” would facilitate this simultaneous viewing.

posts.author: nnehila (Nick)
posts.cookedHtml: I’d like to be able to view an expanded project page or line item alongside its associated attachments/files. A “right-click” option on attachments/files to “open in new tab” would facilitate this simultaneous viewing.
